creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi Jason, 

thanks for reporting this and your interest maintaining this port. 

A different committer has removed the "local" mirror already, and 
I don't think we need another one for the time being -- savannah 
features a number of regular mirror sites. 

Since I was also looking into maintaining this, and this is easier 
(and preferred) for a committer, I did take this myself for now. 
I'll be more than happy to closely work together on any changes, 
just reach out to me for anything you have in mind. 

(I did notice the explicit setting of CONFIGURE_ARGS which really 
should not be necessary.  This looks like something to fix at the 
global level, and I'll be looking into that.)
